raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's gas prices are almost a dollar more than almost anywhere else in the country due to laws, regulations, and taxes.",
    "Democrat legislators have requested an investigation into a 'mystery' charge that they believe is unfairly inflating gas prices.",
    "The high gas prices in California are not due to nefarious actions by 'Big Oil,' but are instead the result of policies supported by Democrat legislators.",
    "An analysis done by Stillwater Associates in 2018 projected that gas prices in California could jump by another one to two dollars per gallon by 2030 due to Cap-and-Trade and Low Carbon Fuel Standard programs.",
    "California has 25 percent of the nation's homeless population and double the national average of homeless per 10,000 people.",
    "According to the California Poverty Measure, almost 40 percent of Californians are living in or near poverty."
  ]
}
```
